data.title: VEON Reports 4.7% Q4 Sales Growth As Digital Push Accelerates, Eyes Double-Digit Gains In 2025
data.description: VEON reported strong Q4 2024 results with 4.7% sales growth and 42.4% rise in digital revenues. Multiplay customers grew 17.7% and buyback announced.

data.title: Chevron CEO Reportedly Seeks Trump's Support For Venezuela Exit Extension
data.description: In the wake of the Trump administration's decision to revoke Chevron Corp. (NYSE: CVX) license to operate in Venezuela, CEO Mike Wirth is seeking an extension to wind down the company's operations in the country.

data.title: Shoe Carnival Q4 Earnings: Sales Miss & EPS Beat, New Shoe Station Strategy, Gloomy Outlook And More
data.description: Shoe Carnival shares fell in premarket trading following fourth-quarter earnings report. The company posted a 6.15% YoY sales decline to $262.94 million, missing analysts' estimates. Comparable store sales fell 6.3%, while gross profit dropped 8.1%. Despite this, adjusted EPS of $0.54 beat the consensus estimate.

data.title: How To Approach Investing Amid Current volatility? Remember Risk Management?
data.description: "Don't be married to your beliefs" - says this contributor, who manages client portfolios for high net-worth clients.

data.title: Donald Trump Reportedly Making 'Big Announcement' For 'Next Steps In Crypto Policy' At Digital Asset Summit On Thursday
data.description: President Donald Trump is set to address the Digital Asset Summit (DAS) in New York City later today and is expected to make key announcements related to crypto policies in the United States.
